title: leptochilus axillaris
intro: Leptochilus axillaris, also known as the Axillary Club Moss or Scurvine, is a species of club moss that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Leptochilus axillaris include its potential to treat scurvy, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and fight off infections. Leptochilus axillaris can be prepared as a tea or infused in water to use its herbal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
